description: Curated fixture memories for dogfooding the memory agent. Three intentional semantic clusters + noise. Cluster labels drive the /eval command's scoring.

memories.body: Always rebase on the base branch before pushing. CI fails otherwise because of cargo lock drift.
PR auto-merge must be enabled with --squash; anything else fights the merge queue.
After a PR merges, the task moves to trash and you switch back to master with a pull. That is the complete cycle.
The schema service deduplicates semantically equivalent schemas across nodes via embedding similarity on field descriptions.
Bidirectional best-match verification prevents many-to-one field mappings during canonical field resolution.
Schema expansion keeps a blocked old schema and a superset new schema with field mappers pointing shared fields to the existing molecules.
Transform views take multi-query input across source schemas; WASM emits multi-row typed output keyed by whatever the WASM chooses.
View caches are reactive. Source mutation invalidates dependent view caches and spawns background precomputation for deep views.
WASM views cannot be written to directly today; only identity views redirect mutations to source schemas. Writing to a WASM view errors.
Mount Rainier Paradise trail is crowded on weekends; go weekdays for better photos.
The espresso machine at home needs descaling every 3 months. Last done in February.
Fei prefers async review comments over synchronous Slack DMs for design feedback.
